shell.unsubscribe_prompt: Ma dooneysid emaylo sida kan oo kale ah?

welcome.subject: Ku soo dhawoow AskBiz — iibkaaga koowaad wuxuu qaadanayaa 2 daqiiqo
welcome.heading: Salaan {firstName}, waad gashay.
welcome.body: AskBiz waa keeshkaaga, la-socodka kaydkaaga, iyo warbixinta dhammaadka maalinta — oo ku jira taleefanka horeba jeebkaaga ugu jira. Waa kaas waxa kaliya loo baahan yahay:
welcome.step1: U jeedi kamaraddaada badeeco — bilaa qori barkoodh, bilaa habayn.
welcome.step2: Qaado EVC Plus, Zaad, lacagta mobiilka, lacag caddaan ama kaadh.
welcome.step3: Caawa, arag si sax ah waxa aad samaysay iyo waxa dhammaanaya.
welcome.closing: Wax kugu adkaaday? Ka jawaab emaylkan — qof dhab ah ayaa akhriya.

reengage_7.subject: Salaan {firstName} — hubin degdeg ah oo ka timid AskBiz
reengage_7.heading: Waan ku hubinayaa.
reengage_7.body1: Salaan {firstName} — waxaan hadda ogaaday inay tahay ku dhawaad toddobaad. Cadaadis ma jiro, ganacsi wadidu waa shaqo mashquul badan.
reengage_7.body2: Wax walba waxay ku yaalliin meeshii aad ka tagtay: xogtaada, daashboodhkaaga, qorshahaaga bilaashka ah. Haddii wax kugu adkaaday, ka jawaab oo waan si toos ah kaa caawin doonaa.
reengage_7.cta: Ka sii wad meeshii aad ka tagtay →
reengage_7.closing: Akoonkaaga iyo qorshaha bilaashka ah waxay ku yaalliin sidii aad uga tagtay.

reengage_14.subject: Xaggee baad joogtay, {firstName}? Tirooyinkaaga way ku xiiseeyaan
reengage_14.heading: Muddo ayaa la joogaa.
reengage_14.body1: Salaan {firstName} — waxaan ogaanay inaadan soo gelin dhawaanahan. Cambaareyn ma jirto. Kaliya xasuusin waxa ku sugaya:
reengage_14.body2: Iib walba oo lagu diiwaangeliyay taleefankaaga. Kayd kaa digaya inta uusan dhammaan. Iyo dhammaadka maalinta, hal tiro oo muhiim ah: waxa aad dhab ahaan samaysay.
reengage_14.cta: Ka sii wad meeshii aad ka tagtay →
reengage_14.closing: Akoonkaaga iyo qorshaha bilaashka ah waxay ku yaalliin sidii aad uga tagtay. Haddii wax aanu kuu shaqeynin, ka jawaab oo noo sheeg — mid kastaba waan akhrinaa.

reengage_30.subject: Wax walba waan kuu hayney, {firstName}
reengage_30.heading: Bil ayaa la joogaa.
reengage_30.body1: Salaan {firstName} — bil ayaa la joogaa, sidaas darteed waxaan rabay inaan aniga qudhaydu ku hubiyo intii aan arrintan aamusnaan u dhaafi lahaa.
reengage_30.body2: Akoonkaaga, xogtaada, qorshahaaga bilaashka ah — midna meelna ma tagin. Haddii AskBiz uusan ku habboonayn, runtii waxaan jeclaan lahaa inaan ogaado sababta — ka jawaab oo ii sheeg, xanaaq ma jiro. Haddii aad kaliya mashquul noqotay, iibkaaga koowaad weli waa 2 daqiiqo markasta oo aad diyaar tahay.

plan_upgrade.subject: Ku soo dhawoow {planName}, {firstName}!
plan_upgrade.heading: Salaan {firstName}, ku soo dhawoow {planName}!
plan_upgrade.body: Aad ayaan ugu faraxsan nahay inaad kor u qaadday. Waa kan waxa hadda kuu shidmay:
plan_upgrade.closing: Haddii wax ku saabsan {planName} uusan u shaqeynin sidaad u baahan tahay, kaliya ka jawaab emaylkan — waxaan shakhsi ahaan hubin doonaa in la hagaajiyo.

pos_welcome.subject: Ku soo dhawoow AskBiz POS, {firstName}!
pos_welcome.heading: Salaan {firstName}, ku soo dhawoow AskBiz POS!
pos_welcome.body1: Aad ayaan ugu faraxsan nahay inaad ku dartay AskBiz POS — ku soo dhawoow qoyska.
pos_welcome.body2: Keeshkaaga, la-socodka kaydkaaga, iyo warbixinta dhammaadka maalinta ayaa hadda firfircoon, si toos ah oo la socda inta kale ee akoonkaaga AskBiz.
pos_welcome.closing: Haddii wax uusan u shaqeynin sidaad u baahan tahay, kaliya ka jawaab emaylkan — waxaan shakhsi ahaan hubin doonaa in la hagaajiyo.

growth: Isku-xir xog toos ah (Shopify, Stripe, Sheets)
business: Faylal aan xad lahayn oo la soo geliyo
enterprise: Wax kasta oo aan xad lahayn
Xubno koox ah oo aan xad lahayn
